# Flex Ltd — NVL72 EMS / Assembly
Last updated: 2026-04-01

## Company Overview
- **HQ:** Singapore (operations in 30+ countries)
- Formerly Flextronics — rebranded Flex Ltd ~2016
- NASDAQ: FLEX
- Revenue: ~$26B USD annually
- CEO: Revathi Advaithi
- One of the top 3 global EMS (Electronics Manufacturing Services) companies

## Role in NVL72 Supply Chain
- **Contract manufacturer** for server tray assemblies and liquid cooling subassemblies
- Flex competes with Foxconn and Wistron for NVL72 tray ODM slots
- Supplies complete liquid-cooled server tray assemblies to NVIDIA OEM customers
- Internal manifold and plumbing integration performed at Flex facilities
- Flex has dedicated AI infrastructure manufacturing lines post-2024 buildout

## Key Capabilities Relevant to NVL72
- Precision sheet metal fabrication (tray chassis)
- Liquid cooling loop integration (manifold routing, QD installation)
- Cold plate assembly integration
- Full system test and burn-in
- Global logistics (builds in Mexico, Malaysia, US for regional delivery)

## Data Center / AI Focus
- Flex Agility Works division — focused on AI infrastructure manufacturing
- US manufacturing: Milpitas CA, Guadalajara Mexico, Austin TX
- Growing share of AI server / GPU rack manufacturing
- Partners with multiple CDU vendors for thermal qualification

## ADC Relevance
- Supply chain intelligence — Flex is a potential secondary source if Foxconn has NVL72 tray lead time constraints
- Flex US manufacturing in Texas = relevant to ADC regional supply chain

## Key Contacts
- Revathi Advaithi (CEO) — LinkedIn active
- Data Center vertical business development — flex.com/contact
